\tzpentry{ID5670}{Phase Angle Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5670 introduces Phase Angle Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ B_r(r,\theta,\phi,t)=\sum_{\ell,m} a_{\ell m}(r,t)\,Y_\ell^m(\theta,\phi), \quad B_\theta + iB_\phi=\sum_{\ell,m} b_{\ell m}(r,t)\,\nabla_{\mathrm{tan}}Y_\ell^m(\theta,\phi), \]
